user_story_groups.story: As the main operator, I can ask normal Codex with Codexter installed to prepare a ticket and see exactly where it can run without accidentally triggering a runner.
evidence: allowed-local-shared.json returns ready local_shared with no setup
deferred-local-worktree.json blocks with missing_worktree_runtime and a ticket_runtime setup hint

user_story_groups.story: As a Symphony integrator, I need Codexter to express unsupported external compute as a clean admission decision so Symphony can own scheduling and launching.
evidence: blocked-symphony.json contains unsupported_target and keeps the handoff as external runner launches normal Codex with Codexter installed
codexter_compute.py does not poll, retry, or launch Codex

user_story_groups.group: future cloud or worktree adapter author
user_story_groups.story: As an adapter author, I can see target capability, runtime hints, required setup, and blocker codes without reverse-engineering free-text reasons.
evidence: ComputeDecision now exposes blockerCodes, runtimeHints, requiredSetup, handoff, and capability
test_codexter_compute.py covers precedence, worktree records, future targets, and dependency gates

user_story_groups.story: As a maintainer, I can verify that unsupported targets never silently fall back and that local_worktree does not create a worktree by surprise.
evidence: compute selector tests assert missing runtime blocks local_worktree
prepare artifacts show blocked future targets instead of fallback

risks.risk: Dependency resolution is conservative in invocation prepare because the selector only knows explicit resolved dependency IDs when a caller supplies them.
risks.reason: This keeps v2 admission safe. Ralph or a future board adapter should pass resolved dependency context before build dispatch.

risks.risk: local_worktree setup is only a hint and not automatically executed.
risks.reason: The ticket explicitly forbids turning the selector into a runner; pr-runtime and ticket_runtime remain the setup surfaces.

commands: python3 bin/codexter_invocation.py prepare --ticket TASK-0114 --phase planning --compute local_worktree --proof tickets/TASK-0114/artifacts/compute/local-worktree.proof.json
python3 bin/codexter_invocation.py prepare --ticket TASK-0114 --phase planning --compute symphony --proof tickets/TASK-0114/artifacts/compute/symphony.proof.json
python3 bin/codexter_invocation.py prepare --ticket TASK-0114 --phase planning --compute codex_cloud --proof tickets/TASK-0114/artifacts/compute/codex-cloud.proof.json
python3 - <<'PY' ... feature registry status-aware validation ... PY
